title: cordia clarkei
intro: Cordia clarkei is a medicinal plant also known as the 'Wild Pear' or 'Gulancha', belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cordia clarkei include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Cordia clarkei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts can also be used in modern herbal medicine formulations.
